title: lithocardium leucocephalum
intro: Lithocardium leucocephalum, also known as Digitalis purpurea, is a flowering plant in the foxglove family that has been used for centuries in traditional medicine. The plant's leaves contain cardiac glycosides, which have been found to have medicinal properties that help regulate heart rhythm and increase cardiac output. The health benefits of Lithocardium leucocephalum include reducing symptoms of congestive heart failure, controlling atrial fibrillation, and increasing the strength of heart contractions. The herbal preparations of Lithocardium leucocephalum include dried leaf extracts, tinctures, and tablets that are often used to treat conditions related to the cardiovascular system.
